\tzpentry{ID5915}{Donut Holes Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5915 introduces Donut Holes Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \nabla^2_{S^2} Y = -\ell(\ell+1) Y \end{equation}
